text: We present a new dataset to advance the art of object classification. We include it as part of the larger problem of scene understanding. Our new dataset, Scene Understanding through Object Recogntion (SUOR), is a new dataset of scenes and their objects. Our training set has 8K training images of everyday scenes with 91 objects recognizable by a 4 year old, 2.5M annotated objects and 328K training images. We collected our training set with crowdsourcing techniques such as specialized user interfaces for object classification, object localization and object segmentation. We present the statistic comparison for our dataset with PASCAL, ImageNet and SUN datasets and baseline experiments using a deformable parts model for object localization and object segmentation tasks.
headline: Fully Human Written
